annotations.summary: order-service P99 latency above 5 seconds across all endpoints
annotations.description: P99 response latency exceeded 5000ms for 12 consecutive minutes. Error rate remains normal at 0.1 percent. No recent deployment. Suspect runtime or infrastructure issue.
